# MLRecommender.SimilarityType.jaccard

**Case**

The Jaccard similarity measure.

## Declaration

```swift
case jaccard
```

## Discussion

Use Jaccard similarity when the presence or absence of a user’s rating is more important than the rating itself.

## Similarity types

- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType.cosine**: The cosine similarity measure.
- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType.pearson**: The Pearson correlation similarity measure.
title: MLRecommender.SimilarityType.jaccard
